title: Mechanical equation GUI Add-on for Sophisticated Backpack mod
description: This is an add-on for Mechanical Equation GUI pack,It made unique textures for most of the GUI images of Sophisticated Backpack mod.
body:
This is an add-on for Mechanical Equation GUI pack,It made unique textures for most of the GUI images of Sophisticated Backpack mod.If you want the same style for the vanilla GUI, download [Mechanical Equation GUI pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mechanical-equation-gui-pack).

**Known issues (does not affect the game):**
_The scroller panel of the large backpack was not found in the resource file, so this texture was not modified_![This texture has not been changed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d0a5126ac7cc58c5639ce09bb869aee6ea689c8.png)
![This texture has not been changed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2e44b1704c2e1f3db853d788d176ac81822554b.png)

### **_Just keep in mind:_**

**_Make sure to credit, and don't claim Mechanical Equation GUI as your own creation._**
